creator: anthaelle@gmail.com
text:
VMWare
ESXi : 7.0.3
Build: 20036589

Virtual Machine 
Opnsense running FreeBsd 13
FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE stable/22.7-n250212-a26d6065f1f SMP amd64
4 NIC 1G binded on driver VMXNEXT3
2 NIC 10G binded on driver VMXNEXT3

TX and RX are the same on the 1G and 10G interfaces
Logs reports following informations
 Using 512 TX descriptors and 512 RX descriptors
 Using 2 RX queues 2 TX queues
 Using MSI-X interrupts with 3 vectors
 netmap queues/slots: TX 2/512, RX 2/512

iflib_netmap_config       txr 2 rxr 2 txd 512 rxd 512 rbufsz 2048

Is it possible to active the PCI Passthrought on this distribution ?

Thanks.
